title: Airtel India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Airtel India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Full Stack Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
